description: PIK (Payment-in-Kind) bond pricer. Covers instruments where interest is paid by accreting into the outstanding principal rather than in cash. Supports full PIK (all interest capitalises, compounding zero-coupon redemption) and PIK toggle (issuer elects each period to pay cash or PIK, with optional PIK step-up rate). Common in leveraged finance, mezzanine debt, and private credit.

required_fields.name: instrument_type
required_fields.description: Payoff structure of the PIK instrument

required_fields.name: coupon_rate
required_fields.description: Base coupon / PIK accrual rate (decimal or %, auto-normalised). For full_pik this is the PIK rate. For pik_toggle this is the cash coupon rate; set pik_rate or pik_rate_step_up if the PIK rate differs.

required_fields.name: coupon_frequency
required_fields.description: Frequency at which PIK accretes and cash coupons pay (capitalisation frequency)

required_fields.name: accrual_day_count
required_fields.description: Day count convention for period accrual

required_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
required_fields.description: Z-spread over the discount curve in basis points (issuer credit premium)

optional_fields.name: par
optional_fields.description: Initial face / principal value (default 100). Final redemption will exceed this by the total PIK accreted.

optional_fields.name: pik_election
optional_fields.description: For pik_toggle: fraction of each coupon paid in kind (0.0 = all cash, 1.0 = all PIK, e.g. 0.5 for 50/50). Has no effect for full_pik.

optional_fields.name: pik_rate
optional_fields.description: Explicit PIK accrual rate if it differs from coupon_rate (e.g. for toggle bonds with a step-up). If omitted, defaults to coupon_rate + pik_rate_step_up.

optional_fields.name: pik_rate_step_up
optional_fields.description: Additional spread added to coupon_rate to obtain the PIK accrual rate (e.g. 0.0075 for +75 bp). Ignored if pik_rate is set explicitly.

optional_fields.name: first_coupon_date
optional_fields.description: Override for bonds with a short or long first coupon / capitalisation period (DD-MM-YYYY)

optional_fields.name: currency
optional_fields.description: Settlement currency (e.g. EUR, USD) — used for discount curve selection
